fullExtractedText: JACOB CHAFFIN SENIOR ENGINEER Beverly Hills 90210, United States | jchaffin57@gmail.co | 6503803288 | LinkedIn PROFILE Full-stack engineer with 7+ years building and operating production real-time and applied AI systems. Experience designing K8s-based GPU inference platforms and low-latency streaming services using LiveKit and WebRTC, and delivering end-to-end APIs and product features with strong observability and CI/CD. Scaled voice and conversational infrastructure to 6M+ users while maintaining sub-200 ms conversational latency and 99.9% uptime. Skilled in Python, Node.js/TypeScript, Next.js/React, and productionizing model-backed services. PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE Senior Fullstack Engineer, StudyFetch Beverly Hills, CA 2025 to 2026 Infrastructural Ownership: Architected and owned the real-time voice call and conversational avatar infrastructure for Spark.E and TutorMe, scaling the systems to support 6M+ users and a $11.5M Series A. Real-Time Agent Orchestration: Engineered a LiveKit-based agent over WebRTC to handle synchronized live audio, video, and the Spark.E avatar s interactive state, achieving sub-100ms conversational latency. Contextual Grounding: Developed a custom LiveKit DataChannel pipeline to inject study-set context and session state into the LLM, ensuring the avatar s responses were grounded in assigned materials. Secure Cloud Architecture: Designed and deployed a Node.js authentication and token service on GCP utilizing JWT/LiveKit access tokens and Twilio SMS verification for high-concurrency access. Data-Driven Progression: Implemented a Kafka-driven ELO feedback pipeline to analyze session data in real-time and dynamically adapt student learning paths based on performance metrics. Infrastructure Reliability: Managed the end-to-end voice session lifecycle and connection stability, ensuring 99.9% uptime during massive global traffic spikes. Software Engineer, UniphoreJun 2021 to Oct 2024 Built and operated production backend services for conversational AI, shipping low-latency APIs and streaming interfaces used by voice workflows. Owned deployment automation for model-backed services, including CI/CD, environment promotion, canary-style rollouts, and reproducible builds across multiple environments. Implemented observability for real-time systems (structured logging, metrics, tracing, alerting), reducing time-to-diagnosis for latency regressions and incident response. Integrated speech and language components into stable production pipelines, evolving systems from classic NLU patterns toward LLM-backed orchestration where it improved product outcomes. Designed service boundaries and data contracts for multi-tenant operation, with attention to reliability under concurrent traffic and failure-mode handling. Built internal tooling to speed iteration (evaluation harnesses, replay workflows, regression checks), improving confidence when shipping changes to live traffic. Partnered cross-functionally with product and applied teams to translate model behavior into deployable, measurable services, and to close gaps discovered in production. AI Associate, Wave Computing Campbell, CA Jun 2018 to 2020 Built custom TensorFlow ops to simulate neural network execution on the DPU Compiler, enabling early validation of operator behavior and alignment with hardware constraints. Developed and optimized neural networks for audio and vision classification using PyTorch. Designed and maintained an interactive visualization tool for error tracing on Wave's proprietary DPU-based compiler. Developed full-stack admin tools with Node.js, React, and GraphQL for secure login and data transfer to AWS S3, deployed via Docker containers. Reduced API payload size by 40% and streamlined file management workflows. EDUCATION University of California BS, Los Angeles Sept 2017 to Dec 2020 Linguistics and Computer Science Page 1 LINKS Github, LinkedIn, Website AREAS OF EXPERTISE Applied AI/LLMs/ML Conversational AI Node.js/Typescript/React LLMs Python WebRTC PROJECTS ProsodyAI 2024 to 2026 SSM Architecture Innovation: Architected ProsodySSM, a speech intelligence framework utilizing a 4-layer Mamba SSM with linear O(n) complexity for long-context audio processing. Real-Time Conversational Intelligence: Shipped a streaming audio ingest system with pre-ASR feature extraction, delivering sub-200ms p95 inference for live agent guidance and post-call analytics. Enterprise Product Surface: Built a multi-tenant product in TypeScript/Next.js featuring strict tenant isolation, RBAC, and comprehensive auditability for enterprise QA and search dashboards. Causal Prediction Systems: Developed a GRU-based Forward Prediction engine with 8 predictive heads to track session-level outcomes like Escalation Risk and CSAT with sequence-length confidence scaling. Signal Processing Optimization: Engineered a 32-dimensional prosodic feature extraction suite (F0, Energy, HNR, Jitter) running parallel to ASR for real-time VAD (Valence-Arousal-Dominance) regression. AureliaStudio.aiFeb 2026 Built a multi-tenant voice AI platform for luxury MedSpas. Orchestrated real-time booking, payments, memberships, and intake flows using a LangGraph state machine with dynamic STT/LLM/TTS routing (including Orpheus TTS) per call. Deployed LiveKit Cloud (WebRTC + SIP), Apollo Federation across 5 GraphQL services, Stripe Connect for per-tenant payments, and AWS infrastructure provisioned via Terraform. Tech: LangGraph, LiveKit, Orpheus TTS, GraphQL, AWS (EKS, RDS, DynamoDB, Kafka), Terraform, Stripe Connect Page 2
